description_en: The mahogany body provides warm mid-to-high frequencies. Roasted maple neck ensures stability with bright, focused sound. SSH Alnico 5 pickup configuration handles various musical styles. Natural C-shaped neck with rounded fret ends for smooth playability.
description_cn: 桃花心木琴体提供温暖的中高频。烤枫木琴颈确保稳定性，声音明亮聚焦。SSH Alnico 5拾音器配置适应各种音乐风格。自然C型琴颈搭配圆角品丝，手感顺滑。
